consistency.notes: The item description is internally consistent, detailing a base form (magic mace) and multiple transformation options via buttons. The bonus properties (Drain Life, Paralyze, Terrify) are clearly defined with usage limitations (recharge at dawn or single use per use type).

quality.notes: The description is highly detailed, covering weapon transformation mechanics, specific mechanical changes (e.g., climbing pole features), and powerful, limited-use abilities. The rarity (Legendary) aligns with the complexity and power level of the item.

mechanics.base_form: Magic Mace (+3 bonus to attack and damage rolls).

transformations.effect: Becomes a Flame Tongue. (Implied +3 bonus is carried over or replaced by Flame Tongue properties, though not explicitly stated, typically Flame Tongue does not stack with generic attack bonuses unless specified, assuming the base +3 carries over if applicable to the new weapon type, or the Flame Tongue damage replaces it).
Transforms into a magic Battleaxe (+3 bonus to attack and damage rolls).
Transforms into a magic Spear (+3 bonus to attack and damage rolls).
Transforms into a climbing pole (up to 50 ft), granting climbing/anchoring utility and bearing capacity (4,000 lbs).
Transforms into a handheld battering ram, granting a +10 bonus to Strength checks made to break barriers.
Reverts to normal form, indicates magnetic north, provides depth/height awareness.

bonus_properties.name: Drain Life
bonus_properties.effect: DC 17 CON save or target takes 4d6 necrotic damage; user heals half that damage.

bonus_properties.name: Paralyze
bonus_properties.effect: DC 17 STR save or target is paralyzed for 1 minute (repeats save end of turn).

bonus_properties.name: Terrify
bonus_properties.effect: DC 17 WIS save or target is frightened for 1 minute (repeats save end of turn).

mechanics.mechanic_notes: The bonus action transformation mechanic is robust. The three primary combat additions all require a DC 17 save (CON, STR, WIS) and recharge daily, balancing their power. The explicit saving throw DC (17) is noted.
